# Three-Way Conflict Demo — canonical version

This file demonstrates the both-changed scenario. The canonical side has
been updated since the last graft, but so has the wrapper side.

## Canonical updates (2026-05-07)

- Added a new section on cross-forge graft semantics
- Tightened the language around dry-run discipline
- Cross-referenced ADR-001 § Wave 1 Substrate-Neutrality Ratchet
